description: Monthly traffic assumptions for the Northwind support agent cost model.
output_reduction_rationale: Optimized prompt caps replies at ~150 words, removes mandated greetings/restating/sign-offs. 280->170 avg output tokens is a conservative estimate for this policy change.

cache.note: System prompt + tool schemas marked with cache_control. 95% steady-state hit rate is typical for high-volume single-agent traffic; the 5% misses pay the 1.25x cache-write premium.

simple.examples: order status, tracking, gift card balance, shipping questions

standard.examples: returns, refunds, account changes, multi-step or ambiguous issues

routing.note: Share estimates should come from classifying a sample of real production transcripts before deployment.
